summary: Comprehensive testing of Email OTP Verification System. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified registration flow, verify-account page with 6-digit OTP input, resend cooldown timer, admin customers page with verification management, and admin settings with Firebase configuration.
passed_tests: Registration creates unverified user (email_verified=false)
Registration returns requires_verification=true and verification message
Login returns email_verified status in user object
Verification status endpoint (/auth/verification-status) returns email_verified and can_checkout
Resend OTP endpoint respects 30-second cooldown
Resend OTP requires authentication
Invalid OTP is rejected with attempts remaining message
Verify email requires authentication
Admin /admin/customers endpoint returns customers with email_verified field
Admin can manually verify user email via /admin/users/{id}/verify-email
Admin can resend OTP via /admin/users/{id}/resend-otp
Admin endpoints require admin role (403 for regular users)
Admin settings include Firebase email configuration fields
Already verified user gets 'already verified' response
Resend OTP fails for already verified user
UI: Register page shows verification code message
UI: Registration redirects to /verify-account
UI: Verify Account page shows 6-digit OTP input boxes
UI: Resend OTP has countdown timer (30 seconds)
UI: Admin Customers page shows Email Verified column with Yes/No badges
UI: Admin Customers page shows Shield (verify) and Refresh (resend) buttons for unverified users
UI: Admin Settings shows Firebase Email Configuration section with DISABLED badge
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: get_settings() now merges default settings with existing DB settings to ensure new fields (firebase_enabled, etc.) are always present
Fixed: /admin/customers endpoint now ensures email_verified field exists for all customers (defaults to false for older users)
AccountPage.js correctly shows Email Verified badge with 'Verify Now' link for unverified users
CheckoutPage.js correctly shows verification modal when unverified user tries to place order
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed get_settings() to merge default settings
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed /admin/customers to include email_verified for all users
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email OTP verification system fully implemented and tested. All features working: registration creates unverified user, verify-account page with 6-digit OTP input and 30-second resend cooldown, admin customers page with verification management (Shield button for manual verify, Refresh button for resend OTP), admin settings with Firebase email configuration. Note: Email sending via SendGrid is MOCKED - OTPs are generated but emails may not be delivered without valid API key. Admin can manually verify users from /admin/customers page.

features_verified.registration_creates_unverified_user: PASS - User created with email_verified=false, redirects to /verify-account
features_verified.verify_account_page_otp_input: PASS - Shows 6 digit input boxes with data-testid='otp-input-{0-5}'
features_verified.resend_otp_cooldown: PASS - 30-second countdown timer, button disabled during cooldown
features_verified.login_redirects_unverified: PASS - Unverified users redirected to /verify-account after login
features_verified.account_page_verified_status: PASS - Shows green 'Verified' badge or orange 'Verify Now' link
features_verified.checkout_blocks_unverified: PASS - Modal shown with 'Email Verification Required' message
features_verified.admin_customers_page: PASS - Shows all customers with Email Verified column (Yes/No badges)
features_verified.admin_firebase_settings: PASS - Firebase Email Configuration section with enable toggle and API key fields

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - SendGrid API key not configured, OTPs generated but emails not delivered
